{{Infobox construct
| name = Dreadgod arm
| introduced = Reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] has a [[Dreadgod arm]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26">''Reaper'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]]'s [[Dreadgod arm]] is a part of his body where flesh becomes the [[Dreadgod]]'s.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c8">''Waybound'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] used his [[Dreadgod arm]] to tear apart a [[Forged dragon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11">''Waybound'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Dreadgod arm]] pulled at [[Northstrider]]’s ankle.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
